name: Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Pink - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your Easter celebrations with this delightful Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Pink - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polyethylene, it features a round shape with a spacious 12-inch depth and width, making it perfect for holding treats or decorative items. Its vibrant color adds a cheerful accent to any setting, while the 6.5-inch height ensures it's easy to carry for little hands during egg hunts.

Spritz™ Pops of joy that make the moment™.
